76334.subject: 🤖 OpenAI model breaks out of containment to cheat on benchmarks
76334.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $65,989 (-0.4%) | **ETH** $1,927 (-0.2%) | **SOL** $78 (-0.7%)

* OpenAI model [escapes locked test environment](https://decrypt.co/374015/openai-models-escaped-test-environment-hacked-hugging-face-cheat-benchmark) and hacks Hugging Face to cheat on benchmark

* Brent crude oil [crosses $95](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2079881052894482781?s=20) as US/Iran war continues — Iran strikes [Amazon data center](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2079541147819446310?s=20) in Bahrain

* White House pushes Democrats to [accept ethics deal](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2079633335391846521?s=20) to pave way for Clarity Act

* Pavel Durov announces rollout of non-custodial [Gram wallets](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079597590950400315?s=20) to every Telegram user — [GRAM](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/gram/) gains 4% on the day

* Odds of a [rate hike](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2079760571310715302?s=20) by September increase to 71%

* [XStocks expands](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079885189195653178?s=20) to Hong Kong, South Korea, and UK markets

* Satsuma DAT announces [sell off](https://decrypt.co/374018/dat-satsuma-unwind-bitcoin-treasury-sell-off-btc) of $43M BTC treasury

* Balance algorithmic stablecoin [goes to 0](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079863892889514016?s=20) after oracle exploit

* France [bans social media](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2079636207185625287?s=20) for children under 15

* Google launches [3 new AI models](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2079584862487409027?s=20)

* Anthropic launches feature to allow [screen recording](https://x.com/claudeai/status/2079595988998554047?s=20) to teach Claude Cowork new skills

* London Stock Exchange to launch [24/7 trading](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2079352263718383749?s=20) to compete with crypto

* Bitcoin ETFs record [$203M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2079812784704172491?s=20) of net inflows, extending their inflow streak to 6 days

* Elon claims [Grok will generate](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2079760949632737325?s=20) a historically accurate full length movie of “The Odyssey” by the end of the year

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain t

76331.subject: Odkaz na prieskum
76331.body: EmailSurvey_SK /* mobil */ @media only screen and (max-width: 600px){ .wrap { width:100% !important; } .full { display:block !important; width:100% !important; } .p10 { padding:10px !important; } } #outlook a{padding:0;} .ReadMsgBody{width:100%} .ExternalClass{width:100%} .ExternalClass, .ExternalClass p, .ExternalClass span, .ExternalClass td, .ExternalClass div{line-height:100%} img{display:block;border:0;outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic;} table{border-collapse:collapse;border-spacing:0;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt;} 96 Líder v kvalite doručovnia balíkov na Slovensku Vám ďakuje za prejavenú dôveru. Vážený zákazník, ďakujeme za využitie služieb GLS. Veríme, že doručenie Vášho balíka bolo pre Vás príjemným zážitkom. Keďže spoločnosť GLS dbá na kvalitu služieb, ocenili by sme hodnotenie našej práce zodpovedaním niekoľkých krátkych otázok. Dotazník je anonymný a zozbierané údaje budú použité výhradne na ďalšie zlepšovanie našich služieb. Ak ste boli s nami spokojný, ohodnoťte nás prosím 4 alebo 5 hviezdičkami. Ďakujeme za Váš čas. GLS Slovakia Odkaz na prieskum www.gls-group.eu GDPR  |  VOP

76324.subject: RE: Wedding photo+video
76324.body:
Dear Oleg,

There is no obstacle to photography.
The castle is also open on Sunday.
The fee for photography is 45,000 HUF
You will find all the important information in the attachment.
I will send it in English and Slovak.

I have registered you, you can pay on site

Best regards,


From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
Sent: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 11:51 AM
To: Füzérradvány Helyszín <fuzerradvanyikastely@nof.hu>
Subject: Wedding photo+video

Good day,

I would like to reserve a wedding photo session on 26 July 2026, from 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM, for 5 people.

We would like the photo session to take place inside the castle as well as outside in the castle park.

Thank you, and I look forward to your confirmation.

76321.subject: Re: Svadba na Bukovine
76321.body:
Samozrejme. Budem čakať

---

Veronika Hricová

Koordinátor na svadbe

+421948 434 576

www.bukovinakosice.sk

Dňa 2026-07-22 11:21 Oleg Novosadov napísal(a):

> Dobry , mozem Vam napisat na whatsapp?
> 
> вт, 21 лип. 2026 р. о 11:24 Veronika Hricová 
> <veronika.hricova@bukovinakosice.sk> пише:
> 
> Ano mohli, pridem za vami,ukazem vam sklad a odovzdam aj klúče od vašej 
> izby.
> Ano v nedelu kludne priďte od rána,budeme prestierať.
> Chcem sa len opýtať o ktorej vam pridu v nedelu zdobiť salu?
> Ďakujem
> 
> ---
> 
> Veronika Hricová
> 
> Koordinátor na svadbe
> 
> +421948 434 576
> 
> www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]
> 
> Dňa 2026-07-21 11:17 Oleg Novosadov napísal(a):
> 
> Dobry den,
> 
> Mohli by sme prist okolo 11:00 v subotu?
> 
> Hosti 47 + 1 deta ktore nema este 1rok.
> Mohli by sme v nedelu rano mat u Vas fotenie pre zenicha a nevestu?
> 
> Dakujem pekne , pekny den prajem
> 
> вт, 21 лип. 2026 р. о 07:03 Veronika Hricová 
> <veronika.hricova@bukovinakosice.sk> пише:
> 
> Dobrý deň prajem
> Váš svadobný deň u Nás sa Vám blíži preto ak na mňa mate akekoľvek 
> otázky, som tu pre Vás.
> Zároveň sa chcem opýtat,kedy vám  v sobotu vyhovuje stretnutie u nás 
> aby sme si prešli posledné detaily,ukázala vam sklady a priestory kde 
> si môžte zložiť veci. Hosti budete mat nakoniec 47 dospelých,bez deti?  
> Verím, že všetko bude podľa vašich predstav.Tešime sa na Vás.
> 
> S pozdravom Veronika Koordinatorka
> 
> --
> 
> Veronika Hricová
> 
> Koordinátor na svadbe
> 
> +421948 434 576
> 
> www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]
